bull_points: High composite score of 86/100 with no dimension below 70

bear_points: Social is the weakest category at 70/100

rationale: The supplied model strongly favors a bullish signal because the highest-weighted categories are all strong and the composite score is high. Confidence is moderated by the weaker social score and lack of underlying liquidity, contract, and holder concentration details.
